title: autobench.continuous.digest v1
description: Emitted by the SurpriseDigest when a daily digest is generated. Summarises the past 24h of continuous-mode sessions: number of sessions, promotions, and notable surprises (confidently wrong predictions, divergence wins, regressions). Source: /autobench.

date.description: Date for the digest in YYYY-MM-DD form (UTC).

n_sessions.description: Total continuous-mode sessions observed in the window.

n_promotions.description: Number of sessions whose improved harness was promoted to canonical.

n_surprises.description: Total surprises flagged (confidently-wrong + divergence-win + regression + verdict-flip).

biggest_surprise_summary.description: Human-readable description of the most informative surprise in the window.

digest_path.description: Filesystem path of the written markdown digest.
